hero.name: Rosario Moscato
hero.tagline: Building AI agents that think, plan, and ship autonomously.

bio.p1: AI Engineer specializing in autonomous systems and agentic coding workflows. I build AI agents that go beyond chat — systems that plan multi-step tasks, use tools, execute code, and self-correct when things go wrong.
bio.p2: My work spans from production agent architectures to open-source tools and starter kits that help other developers build them faster. I've shipped agentic coding frameworks, automation pipelines, and autonomous development workflows.
bio.p3: I'm also strongly involved in education as trainer, in events as speaker and in writing tech books and magazines articles about Artificial Intelligence.

cv.desc1: Building autonomous agentic systems and agentic coding workflows. Creating open-source tools for the AI developer community.
cv.desc2: Creating educational content on AI, autonomous agents, and automation. Practical tutorials on Claude Code, n8n, and agentic frameworks.

masterclass.title: MASTERCLASS: AGENTIC CODING
masterclass.desc: Learn to build autonomous AI systems that plan, execute, and self-correct. From agentic architecture design to production deployment.
masterclass.b2: Tool use, planning, and self-correction loops
masterclass.b3: Autonomous development workflows with Claude Code, Cursor, and beyond
